seo.title: THE 20s Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Get your sweat on with THE 20s. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and find related content here.

trainers.bioBodi: Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf® Muscle Burns Fat® and #mbfa® Muscle Burns Fat Advanced® on Beachbody On Demand. Known for her straightforward workout style and upbeat personality, Megan knows what it takes to get you in the best shape of your life. Take one of her live BODi classes today!

data.descriptionShort: From cardio to barre pick your favorites!
data.descriptionLong: From cardio to barre, alternative movement to resistance, pick your favorites and get your sweat on with these 20-minute workouts created by the trainers on THE 20s™: The Search for the Next BODi Super Trainer.

equipmentRequired.title: Chin-Up Bar or Bands with Door Attachment

modules.equipment: Agility Ladder or Tape, Chin-Up Bar or Bands with Door Attachment, BOD Rope, Foam Roller, Resistance Bands, Dumbbells, Mat*, Strength Slides*
modules.categories: Barre, Slim & Sculpt, Core, Strength, Cardio, Muscle Building

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf® Muscle Burns Fat® and #mbfa® Muscle Burns Fat Advanced® on Beachbody On Demand. Known for her straightforward workout style and upbeat personality, Megan knows what it takes to get you in the best shape of your life. Take one of her live BODi classes today!

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOtMRk.description: This ruthless 7-day workout is an all-out fat attack with Shaun T.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOtMRk.descriptionShort: This ruthless 7-day workout is an all-out fat attack with Shaun T.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOtMRk.descriptionLong: SHAUN WEEK™: INSANE FOCUS is a seven-day, total-body program developed by Shaun T to motivate you like never before and help you Dig Deeper® than you ever thought possible.

purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVYC8.title: Barre 2
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVYC8.descriptionLong: Grab a chair or stool and get ready to work in this fun and effective total-body barre routine.

trainers.bio: Ericka has loved dance since her first lesson at 3 years old. She’s been a professional cheerleader for the Brooklyn Nets, and has danced in music videos and on the Rascal Flatts tour. She’s felt immense pressure to maintain her weight and has struggled with her body image. Teaching dance and barre has helped build her confidence, and now she’s ready to use her journey to inspire others to reach their best results.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVYQa.title: Pyramax
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVYQa.descriptionLong: This 20-minute, total-body resistance routine packs a serious punch when rep counts are multiplied from round to round.

equipmentRequired.title: Chin-Up Bar or Bands with Door Attachment

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf Muscle Burns Fat, #mbfa Muscle Burns Fat Advanced, and Sure Thing. After appearing on BODi’s fitness reality show, THE 20s, Megan became the next Super Trainer and created Clean Week. Her passion for learning about physiology, health, fitness, and technique fuels every program she creates. Her down-to-earth, empowering workout style and upbeat personality make you feel like you’re training with a best friend.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVYUC.title: Evolution
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVYUC.descriptionLong: Grab a Med Ball or dumbbell and chisel your midsection with Quinn in this simple, but effective core routine.

trainers.bio: Growing up in a small town has taught Quinn the value of family and staying humble, and the benefits of being active. In high school he wrestled, played soccer, football, basketball, baseball, and even had time for band practice. When training clients, he likes to mix different moves from different sports to develop their athleticism and prevent plateaus.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVYaW.title: I Do: Cardio and Abs
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVYaW.descriptionLong: Rachel leads you through some easy-to-follow cardio circuits to get you ready for the Big Day, or any day you want to look and feel your best.

trainers.bio: In 6th grade, Rachel was told she had scoliosis. She wore a back brace all the way through high school and went through two surgeries to have metal rods fused to her spine. Along the way, she learned a big lesson about building up from low points and pushing herself to heal and thrive. Sports and fitness proved to be her lifesaver, and for the past 4 years she’s been training others to overcome their limitations and succeed.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVa4e.title: Team Tactics - Episode 4
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVa4e.descriptionLong: The trainers are divided for a team challenge, judged on performance, personality, and presentation. Stakes are high as the winning team’s workout will be featured on BODi On Demand. Will the group setting hide their weaknesses? Plus, fun surprises emerge, including a special guest appearance and silly antics that lighten the mood.

trainers.bio: Taylor grew up in Denver and played sports from a young age. She led her nationally ranked college lacrosse team. Since graduating, she’s been a personal fitness trainer and high school lacrosse coach. Her approach to Functional Fitness involves teaching people how to stretch, strengthen the core, and improve stabilization. Taylor often says to respect the “power of poise.”

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVa9A.title: Trainers vs. Super Trainers - Episode 5
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVa9A.descriptionLong: See where it all happens. The trainers head to BODi Headquarters in Santa Monica and train with the legendary Super Trainers they idolize. Each trainer must lead the BODi team in an original workout. Plus, romance is in the air as things heat up between two contestants.

trainers.bio: From an early age, Joe’s parents instilled in him the value of hard work, which proved invaluable when he discovered his love of fitness. After being bullied as a kid, he found that the more he trained, the more his confidence and results grew. A few college sports injuries taught him the importance of building his skills and knowledge. He’s written health and fitness books, and today is in demand as a speaker and fitness expert.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVaNc.title: Exposed - Episode 8
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVaNc.descriptionLong: As the rehearsals and video shoots continue, one thing is for sure. BODi is judging the trainers, on and off camera. Will a jokester’s on-camera personality seem dull? Will a trainer turn into a diva behind the scenes and ruin her chances at winning? Plus, the trainers head back to the Hot House and open up about why they are really in this competition.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVaRE.title: Time to Shine - Episode 9
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVaRE.descriptionLong: The last few trainers rehearse for their videos and realize timing is everything. Plus, could the modifier a trainer chose to be in her video be sabotaging her success? Another trainer is on the verge of tears before filming. Will she pull it together? Finally, the videos are complete. But Dan reveals a shocking surprise is coming.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVaZM.title: Meet the Next Beachbody Super Trainer - Episode 12
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPVaZM.descriptionLong: After an incredible competition, our trainers are ready for their last challenge. The Top 3 are chosen and asked to make one final pitch to Beachbody® and a surprise panel of judges. America’s votes will also be counted and considered. Only one will prevail and begin their official climb into the elite Beachbody® Super Trainer ranks. Who will win? You won’t want to miss a minute of the season finale of THE 20s®!

trainers.bio: He was a wild, active child. But after being in a car that was hit by a drunk driver, Derick wasn’t able to do physical activity until he was 17. He worked hard to get in shape and became his high school’s first male cheerleader. His incredible acrobatics and athleticism led to a career in pole fitness, which he now teaches, and he is also a multiple­ time world champion pole dancer.

equipmentRequired.title: Chin-Up Bar or Bands with Door Attachment

trainers.bio: Growing up shy and overweight made Sabrina a depressed young woman. Only after enlisting in the Marines, confronting her temper, and finally getting in shape did she realize that she could use her story as a motivational tool for others. Today, she’s the owner of a personal training company. She mixes military-­style training with plyometrics, and works hard to help others avoid the pitfalls she’s faced.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqNOQ.title: Yellow Team Workout
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqNOQ.descriptionLong: Feel the burn with the winning team from THE 20s, in a fast-paced, high-energy, and total-body cardio challenge.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqNef.title: The Search Begins - Episode 1
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqNef.descriptionLong: After a nationwide search, 20 aspiring trainers arrive at the Hot House to meet BODi co-founders, Carl Daikeler and Jon Congdon, and THE 20s host, Dan Cortese, and to interview once more in their final audition. The pressure builds when they learn that only 11 of them will be moving into the Hot House to continue the competition, and the rest will be going home.

trainers.bio: When her parents divorced, young Kelly turned her energies into sports and fitness. She was a college athlete and then played semi-pro basketball. In her senior year, she began building her personal training business. Today, she’s a firefighter and studies Sports Medicine. Her goal is to train athletes and non-athletes alike, and give them the elite tools that she felt were missing from her athletic development.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqNlV.title: Mind Your Beats and Cues - Episode 3
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqNlV.descriptionLong: BODi LIVE Master Trainers teach the trainers how to lead a BODi LIVE class, focusing on choreography, musicality, and cuing. But will THE 20s hopefuls choose the right program for their skill set? Will the building tension end in actual blood, sweat, and tears? Plus, a shocking announcement puts everyone on edge.

trainers.bio: TJ was born in Africa, but grew up in Brooklyn, NY. He played football at University of Maryland and was offered a contract to play professional football overseas. After college, he continued his training and has been in national commercials for Gatorade, Puma, and others. As a personal trainer, he has built a strong client list, including celebrity clients.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqO02.title: Lights. Cameras. Action. - Episode 7
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqO02.descriptionLong: Dan tells the group there will be no more challenges or ranking ceremonies. Each trainer must now focus on creating, casting, and shooting a beginner and advanced workout video. Things get real during rehearsals with instant feedback from a director and fitness technicians. Will their personalities and training styles still shine through in this new on-set environment?

trainers.bio: From an early age, Joe’s parents instilled in him the value of hard work, which proved invaluable when he discovered his love of fitness. NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqOH8.title: Once More, With Sweat - Episode 10
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqOH8.descriptionLong: If you’ve missed any episodes, this recap will catch you up on everything that’s happened on THE 20s. It’s been an intense ride for our Top 9 trainers. They’ve worked hard. They’ve forged bonds of a lifetime. They’ve put it all on the line. But only one of them can be the Next BODi Super Trainer. Tune in to see how they’ve gotten this far, and where they’ll go from here.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uqONy.descriptionLong: The Top 3 trainers are chosen. It all comes down to a pitch to a secret panel of judges and your vote. Who will be on this mysterious panel? What will the trainers say to prove they have what it takes to be the Next BODi Super Trainer?

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKR0t.title: Guns, Buns and Abs – Beginner
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKR0t.descriptionLong: Shallamar introduces you to her favorite core and booty-sculpting moves in this Tabata-inspired workout.

trainers.bio: Due to suffering from Crohn’s disease and its treatments, Shallamar has seen her weight fluctuate wildly, from underweight to nearly 50 pounds overweight. Getting fit and mastering Tabata helped build her strength and self-­confidence. She loves introducing people to Tabata’s high-­intensity interval training. She might have a chronic disease, but it’s the last thing that can hold her back:::

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKRQ3.descriptionLong: This advanced Tabata-inspired routine will get your heart pumping as you sculpt your arms, glutes, and core.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKRrj.title: Revive Beginner
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKRrj.descriptionLong: Taylor incorporates foam rolling and mobility work before kicking this entry-level resistance workout into gear.

trainers.bio: Taylor grew up in Denver and played sports from a young age. She led her nationally ranked college lacrosse team. Since graduating, she’s been a personal fitness trainer and high school lacrosse coach. Her approach to Functional Fitness involves teaching people how to stretch, strengthen the core, and improve stabilization. Taylor often says to respect the “power of poise.”

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKS4J.descriptionLong: Taylor incorporates foam rolling and mobility work into this total-body resistance workout.

trainers.bio: Taylor grew up in Denver and played sports from a young age. She led her nationally ranked college lacrosse team. Since graduating, she’s been a personal fitness trainer and high school lacrosse coach. Her approach to Functional Fitness involves teaching people how to stretch, strengthen the core, and improve stabilization. Taylor often says to respect the “power of poise.”

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKSEN.title: Black Team Workout
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKSEN.descriptionLong: From THE 20s® Team Challenge, this workout offers a variety of movements to keep your interest and heart rate pumping in an effective 20 minutes.

trainers.bio: Growing up shy and overweight made Sabrina a depressed young woman. Only after enlisting in the Marines, confronting her temper, and finally getting in shape did she realize that she could use her story as a motivational tool for others. Today, she’s the owner of a personal training company. She mixes military-­style training with plyometrics, and works hard to help others avoid the pitfalls she’s faced.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKSdX.title: Quick Start Guide to Nutrition
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKSdX.description: Keep your body fueled for total success and your best results. This guide helps you upgrade your eating habits to optimize your workout performance and create healthier habits throughout this program––and beyond.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKTHn.title: The BODi Crash Course - Episode 2
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKTHn.descriptionLong: The fun and games quickly turn into competition with the first Challenge. The trainers put their skills to the test in an obstacle course using BODi’s hottest programs. They’ll be judged on endurance, form, and speed. Plus, trainers begin creating their own 20-minute workouts. Meanwhile, the girls coordinate a surprise for the boys and a romance is brewing.

trainers.bio: TJ was born in Africa, but grew up in Brooklyn, NY. He played football at University of Maryland and was offered a contract to play professional football overseas. After college, he continued his training and has been in national commercials for Gatorade, Puma, and others. As a personal trainer, he has built a strong client list, including celebrity clients.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKUB9.title: The Elevator to Success - Episode 6
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHKUB9.descriptionLong: BODi “shakes” things up, asking the trainers to give a true elevator pitch—in an elevator. A top BODi Coach goes undercover to interact with—and judge—the very different approaches. Will product knowledge or personality prevail? Will someone do something they regret?

trainers.bio: From an early age, Joe’s parents instilled in him the value of hard work, which proved invaluable when he discovered his love of fitness. After being bullied as a kid, he found that the more he trained, the more his confidence and results grew. A few college sports injuries taught him the importance of building his skills and knowledge. He’s written health and fitness books, and today is in demand as a speaker and fitness expert.

jyITl2R0P6PN5zEcITkBoN.title: Meet THE 20s®
jyITl2R0P6PN5zEcITkBoN.descriptionLong: A house full of 20-something trainers. 1 life-changing contract. Stay tuned for - The Search for the Next BODi Super Trainer...

trainers.bio: Born in Bosnia and Herzegovina and raised in Michigan, Ajdin’s early life was filled with challenging times. He was raised by a single mother, and faced relentless bullying at school for being skinny. In high school, he got into weight training, and seriously committed to the discipline when he started seeing results. After college, he moved to Los Angeles and began his personal training business. He’s single, funny, and driven to win.

Though she’s been athletic her whole life, Bonnie has always struggled with her weight. In high school, a spot on the volleyball team changed her life, which led to an athletic college scholarship. She returned to her high school as a teacher and volleyball team coach. Bonnie looks at each day as an opportunity to motivate her students to reach their full physical and intellectual potential.

He was a wild, active child. But after being in a car that was hit by a drunk driver, Derick wasn’t able to do physical activity until he was 17. He worked hard to get in shape and became his high school’s first male cheerleader. His incredible acrobatics and athleticism led to a career in pole fitness, which he now teaches, and he is also a multiple­ time world champion pole dancer.

As a popular trainer in Miami, Deron knows how to get people into great shape while also having a blast. He’s been training clients, including professional athletes, for over 8 years and leads daily classes that are often booked to capacity. He loves boxing, circuit training, and martial arts. For Deron, fitness is his life’s mission, and one day he hopes to be an icon like his heroes, Tony Horton and Shaun T.

Ericka has loved dance since her first lesson at 3 years old. She’s been a professional cheerleader for the Brooklyn Nets, and has danced in music videos and on the Rascal Flatts tour. She’s felt immense pressure to maintain her weight and has struggled with her body image. Teaching dance and barre has helped build her confidence, and now she’s ready to use her journey to inspire others to reach their best results.

He’s conquered being overweight and coming out. Today, Frank is stronger than ever, physically and mentally. He grew up in Rochester, MI, as the oldest of 3 kids, and was constantly called “the fat one.” He got in shape, moved to Los Angeles, and hasn’t looked back. He’s a personal trainer, group fitness instructor, and specializes in boot camp-­style training for strength conditioning and weight loss.

From an early age, Joe’s parents instilled in him the value of hard work, which proved invaluable when he discovered his love of fitness. After being bullied as a kid, he found that the more he trained, the more his confidence and results grew. A few college sports injuries taught him the importance of building his skills and knowledge. He’s written health and fitness books, and today is in demand as a speaker and fitness expert.

When her parents divorced, young Kelly turned her energies into sports and fitness. She was a college athlete and then played semi-pro basketball. In her senior year, she began building her personal training business. Today, she’s a firefighter and studies Sports Medicine. Her goal is to train athletes and non-athletes alike, and give them the elite tools that she felt were missing from her athletic development.

Megan D. loved fitness from a very early age. Over time, her competitive bodybuilding and healthy eating inspired her entire family to get in shape. When her first job after college kept her deskbound, she quit and opened a gym at her dad’s urging. Megan realized that her healthy choices had a profound and positive effect on her friends and family, and wants to spread that message even further.

He’s a 2nd degree black belt in karate, teaches parkour, loves yoga, and was the collegiate tree­-climbing national champion. For Michael, fitness is as much a physical thing as it is a spiritual journey. His training specialty is Functional Fitness, which he defines as combining gymnastics, track-and­-field, martial arts, and yoga. He views his clients’ progress on a scale that touches all aspects of their inner and outer selves.

Though today she’s a model and bodybuilder, Pamela grew up as a skinny kid in a small town where bodybuilding and modeling wasn’t a common thing to do. After earning her degree in Kinesiology, which is the study of body movement, she committed to applying her knowledge to her love of fitness. She knows how hard it is to build and maintain her body, and she’s ready to let everyone else in on the secret.

Growing up in a small town has taught Quinn the value of family and staying humble, and the benefits of being active. In high school he wrestled, played soccer, football, basketball, baseball, and even had time for band practice. When training clients, he likes to mix different moves from different sports to develop their athleticism and prevent plateaus.

Quinten is a certified personal trainer who specializes in circuit training, aerobics, and high­-intensity training. When his mom died of cancer, he found himself creating training programs for those whose mobility is affected by illness. For Quinten, personal training is teaching people to improve both how they look and how they feel.

In 6th grade, Rachel was told she had scoliosis. She wore a back brace all the way through high school and went through two surgeries to have metal rods fused to her spine. Along the way, she learned a big lesson about building up from low points and pushing herself to heal and thrive. Sports and fitness proved to be her lifesaver, and for the past 4 years she’s been training others to overcome their limitations and succeed.

After an unhappy relationship led Raquelle to put on 50 pounds from binge-­eating, she knew she had to change her life. Yoga and Pilates helped her change her body, her eating habits, and even her romantic choices. She knows that she’s now on her right path, and loves helping her clients make better choices in their lives, too.

Growing up shy and overweight made Sabrina a depressed young woman. Only after enlisting in the Marines, confronting her temper, and finally getting in shape did she realize that she could use her story as a motivational tool for others. Today, she’s the owner of a personal training company. She mixes military-­style training with plyometrics, and works hard to help others avoid the pitfalls she’s faced.

Due to suffering from Crohn’s disease and its treatments, Shallamar has seen her weight fluctuate wildly, from underweight to nearly 50 pounds overweight. Getting fit and mastering Tabata helped build her strength and self-­confidence. She loves introducing people to Tabata’s high-­intensity interval training. She might have a chronic disease, but it’s the last thing that can hold her back:::

Taylor grew up in Denver and played sports from a young age. She led her nationally ranked college lacrosse team. Since graduating, she’s been a personal fitness trainer and high school lacrosse coach. Her approach to Functional Fitness involves teaching people how to stretch, strengthen the core, and improve stabilization. Taylor often says to respect the “power of poise.”

TJ was born in Africa, but grew up in Brooklyn, NY. He played football at University of Maryland and was offered a contract to play professional football overseas. After college, he continued his training and has been in national commercials for Gatorade, Puma, and others. As a personal trainer, he has built a strong client list, including celebrity clients.
